data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit bc1963b82eca on origin/main, (2) CI green (CI + Coverage Badge workflows), (3) all 7 commit tags present, (4) 18/18 tests passing (agent-outcome-stats + error-retry suites), (5) no invariant violations. Code implements JSONL-based concurrent-safe agent outcome stats and error-exit retry with action-state rollback and agent pool exclusion.
